channel.title: Bihar on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily
channel.description: Recent content in Bihar on YOJNA PORTAL 2026 - Govt Schemes & Sarkari Job Updates Daily

item.title: Patna High Court Technical Assistant Vacancy 2026
item.description: Patna High Court has released the Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification for 53 vacancies. The online application process will start from 01 April 2026 and continue till 30 April 2026. Candidates with BCA / ITI / Diploma in relevant fields along with 1 year experience are eligible to apply.
